title: Evidence
description: A single, classified piece of evidence bearing on a claim. quality and freshness are normalized [0,1] signals computed upstream (retrieval/classification); the Trust Engine consumes them as given.

EvidenceRelation.title: EvidenceRelation
EvidenceRelation.description: How a piece of evidence relates to the claim under assessment.

id.description: Stable identifier of this evidence item.

source_id.description: Stable id of the originating source, used for independence/corroboration.
